svg.title: MedEvidence-RAG System Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Full layered system architecture for MedEvidence-RAG, covering data ingestion, chunking, storage, query pipeline, generation, evaluation, and infrastructure.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What PDF document types does MedEvidence-RAG support?')
sendPrompt('How are clinical guidelines handled in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('Can MedEvidence-RAG process thesis and technical report documents?')
sendPrompt('How does MedEvidence-RAG handle Markdown files?')
sendPrompt('What other document formats can be ingested in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does the Streamlit UI for MedEvidence-RAG work?')
sendPrompt('What REST endpoints does the FastAPI backend expose?')
sendPrompt('How does the document metadata service work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does Celery asynchronous processing work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does MedEvidence-RAG extract text from PDFs?')
sendPrompt('What text cleaning steps are performed in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does MedEvidence-RAG preserve page-level metadata?')
sendPrompt('What Pydantic schemas are used in the ingestion pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does fixed-size chunking work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does recursive chunking work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does semantic chunking work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does MedEvidence-RAG use OpenAI embeddings?')
sendPrompt('How does MedEvidence-RAG use sentence transformers for local embeddings?')
sendPrompt('How does Qdrant vector database work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does BM25 sparse retrieval indexing work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('What data does PostgreSQL store in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis serve the Celery queue and cache in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does query normalization work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does HyDE hypothetical document embedding work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does query expansion work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does multi-query retrieval work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does dense vector retrieval work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does BM25 sparse keyword retrieval work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does hybrid retrieval with reciprocal rank fusion work?')
sendPrompt('How does cross-encoder reranking work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does top-k evidence selection work in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does prompt templating work in MedEvidence-RAG generation?')
sendPrompt('What does the answer generator return in MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does the RAGAS evaluation framework integrate with MedEvidence-RAG?')
sendPrompt('What retrieval metrics does MedEvidence-RAG benchmark track?')
sendPrompt('How does MedEvidence-RAG track latency, cost, and token usage?')

svg.text: Docker Compose orchestrates all services: api · worker · redis · postgres · qdrant · streamlit
